FC.description: Type alias for a React functional component. Generic over props type P. Includes children in props by default (deprecated in React 18+).

ReactNode.signature: type ReactNode = ReactElement | string | number | Iterable<ReactNode> | ReactPortal | boolean | null | undefined
ReactNode.description: Union type representing any renderable React content: elements, strings, numbers, fragments, portals, booleans, null, and undefined.

ReactElement.signature:
interface ReactElement

= string | JSXElementConstructor> { type: T; props: P; key: string | null; }
ReactElement.description: Represents a React element created by JSX or createElement. Has type, props, and key. Narrower than ReactNode.

CSSProperties.description: Type for inline style objects. All standard CSS properties in camelCase (e.g., backgroundColor, fontSize). Values are strings or numbers.

ChangeEvent.description: Event type fired when the value of an input, select, or textarea element changes. Access the value via e.target.value.

FormEvent.description: Event type fired when a form is submitted. Call e.preventDefault() to prevent the default browser submission.

MouseEvent.signature: interface MouseEvent<T = Element, E = NativeMouseEvent> extends UIEvent<T, E>
MouseEvent.description: Event type for mouse interactions including click, double-click, mouseenter, mouseleave, mousemove, and context menu.

KeyboardEvent.signature: interface KeyboardEvent<T = Element> extends UIEvent<T, NativeKeyboardEvent>
KeyboardEvent.description: Event type for keyboard interactions. Provides key, code, altKey, ctrlKey, metaKey, shiftKey, and repeat properties.

RefObject.signature: interface RefObject<T> { readonly current: T | null; }
RefObject.description: Type for read-only refs typically created by createRef or useRef when not providing an initial value. The .current property starts as null.

MutableRefObject.description: Type for mutable refs created by useRef with an initial value. The .current property can be freely read and written.

Dispatch.description: Type for the dispatch function returned by useReducer. Generic over the action type A.

SetStateAction.description: Type for the argument passed to a setState function. Can be the next state value directly or an updater function.

Context.signature: interface Context<T> { Provider: Provider<T>; Consumer: Consumer<T>; displayName?: string; }
Context.description: Type for a context object created by createContext. Has Provider and Consumer components.

ComponentType.description: Union type of class components and function components. Useful for HOCs, dynamic rendering, and route configurations.

PropsWithChildren.signature:
type PropsWithChildren

= P & { children?: ReactNode | undefined }
PropsWithChildren.description: Utility type that adds an optional children prop of type ReactNode to the given props type P.

HTMLAttributes.description: Type containing all standard HTML attributes for a given element type. Includes className, id, style, event handlers, ARIA attributes, and data attributes.

ComponentProps.signature: type ComponentProps<T extends keyof JSX.IntrinsicElements | JSXElementConstructor<any>>
ComponentProps.description: Extracts the props type from a component type. Works with both intrinsic elements ('button') and custom components (typeof MyComponent).

ElementType.signature:
type ElementType

= { [K in keyof JSX.IntrinsicElements]: P extends JSX.IntrinsicElements[K] ? K : never }[keyof JSX.IntrinsicElements] | ComponentType
ElementType.description: Represents any valid component type: an HTML/SVG tag name string or a React component (function or class).

SyntheticEvent.signature: interface SyntheticEvent<T = Element, E = Event> { bubbles: boolean; cancelable: boolean; currentTarget: T; defaultPrevented: boolean; eventPhase: number; isTrusted: boolean; nativeEvent: E; preventDefault(): void; stopPropagation(): void; target: EventTarget; timeStamp: number; type: string; }
SyntheticEvent.description: Base event type for all React synthetic events. Cross-browser wrapper around native browser events with identical interface.

JSX.Element.signature: namespace JSX { interface Element extends React.ReactElement<any, any> {} }
JSX.Element.description: Represents the return type of a JSX expression. Equivalent to ReactElement. Used by TypeScript for JSX type checking.

JSX.IntrinsicElements.signature: namespace JSX { interface IntrinsicElements { div: HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>; span: HTMLAttributes<HTMLSpanElement>; /* ...all HTML/SVG elements */ } }
JSX.IntrinsicElements.description: Maps HTML and SVG tag names to their attribute types. Used by TypeScript to type-check props on built-in JSX elements.

ReactPortal.signature: interface ReactPortal extends ReactElement { children: ReactNode; }
ReactPortal.description: Represents a React portal element returned by createPortal. Contains the children and the container DOM node.

ErrorInfo.signature: interface ErrorInfo { componentStack: string; digest?: string; }
ErrorInfo.description: Contains the component stack trace when an error is caught by componentDidCatch. Useful for error reporting.

Reducer.signature: type Reducer<S, A> = (prevState: S, action: A) => S
Reducer.description: Type for a reducer function used with useReducer. Takes the previous state and an action, returns the new state.

ReducerAction.signature: type ReducerAction<R extends Reducer<any, any>> = R extends Reducer<any, infer A> ? A : never
ReducerAction.description: Extracts the action type from a Reducer type. Useful for typing dispatch functions.

ReducerState.signature: type ReducerState<R extends Reducer<any, any>> = R extends Reducer<infer S, any> ? S : never
ReducerState.description: Extracts the state type from a Reducer type. Useful for accessing the state shape from a reducer.

DragEvent.signature: interface DragEvent<T = Element> extends MouseEvent<T, NativeDragEvent>
DragEvent.description: Event type for HTML5 drag and drop operations. Provides dataTransfer property for accessing dragged data.

FocusEvent.signature: interface FocusEvent<T = Element, R = Element> extends SyntheticEvent<T, NativeFocusEvent>
FocusEvent.description: Event type for focus and blur events. Provides relatedTarget for the element gaining or losing focus.

TouchEvent.signature: interface TouchEvent<T = Element> extends UIEvent<T, NativeTouchEvent>
TouchEvent.description: Event type for touch interactions on mobile devices. Provides changedTouches, targetTouches, and touches lists.

PointerEvent.signature: interface PointerEvent<T = Element> extends MouseEvent<T, NativePointerEvent>
PointerEvent.description: Unified event type for mouse, touch, and pen input. Provides pointerId, pressure, tiltX, tiltY, and pointerType.

ClipboardEvent.signature: interface ClipboardEvent<T = Element> extends SyntheticEvent<T, NativeClipboardEvent>
ClipboardEvent.description: Event type for clipboard operations (onCopy, onCut, onPaste). Provides clipboardData for accessing clipboard content.

AnimationEvent.signature: interface AnimationEvent<T = Element> extends SyntheticEvent<T, NativeAnimationEvent>
AnimationEvent.description: Event type for CSS animation events (onAnimationStart, onAnimationEnd, onAnimationIteration). Provides animationName and elapsedTime.

TransitionEvent.signature: interface TransitionEvent<T = Element> extends SyntheticEvent<T, NativeTransitionEvent>
TransitionEvent.description: Event type for CSS transition events (onTransitionEnd). Provides propertyName, elapsedTime, and pseudoElement.
